coverages_discussed.notes: Policy WC-HCHP-2025-3350, effective 2025-05-01 to 2026-05-01. Experience Modification Factor of 0.94. Large Risk Rating Plan. Interstate Rating applies. Total expected losses $361,806 across four classification codes.

positives: Final Experience Modification Factor of 0.94 is below 1.0, indicating better-than-average loss experience
Zero excess losses across all three policy years
Actual primary losses of $92,945 are significantly below expected losses of $361,806
Low claim severity — all claims paid and incurred values are equal, suggesting no open/developing claims
Weighting factor of 0.419 reflects credibility appropriate for a large risk
concerns: Claim frequency increased from 2 claims in 2023-2024 to 6 in 2022-2023 and 8 in 2021-2022, suggesting elevated historical frequency
Total incurred losses across three years of $92,945 with 16 total claims
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Three policy years of loss data reported. 2023-2024: 2 claims, $9,940 total incurred. 2022-2023: 6 claims, $26,662 total incurred. 2021-2022: 8 claims, $56,343 total incurred. All losses are fully paid with no excess losses. Total actual primary losses across all years: $92,945.

extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: Texas Department of Insurance Experience Rating Worksheet prepared by Marilyn Rocha, Claims Adjustment Bureau for Hill Country Hospitality Partners, LLC. Policy WC-HCHP-2025-3350. Valuation Date 2026-03-15. Calculated Experience Modification Factor: 0.94.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Insured operates hotel and restaurant facilities in Texas. Classification codes include: 9052 (Hotel — All Other Employees, payroll $9,207,271), 9060 (Hotel — Bellhops/Doorpersons, payroll $1,454,400), 9082 (Restaurant — NOC, payroll $3,678,800), 8810 (Clerical Office Employees — NOC, payroll $1,920,000). Total payroll across all classes spans multiple hospitality and administrative functions.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Three years of loss data provided. 2023-2024: 2 claims totaling $9,940 paid and incurred, $9,940 primary, $0 excess. 2022-2023: 6 claims totaling $26,662 paid and incurred, $26,662 primary, $0 excess. 2021-2022: 8 claims totaling $56,343 paid and incurred, $56,343 primary, $0 excess. No open reserves indicated as paid equals incurred in all years. No excess losses in any year.
